name: listDocuments
description: Lists Google Documents in your Drive, optionally filtered by name or content. Use modifiedAfter to find recently changed documents.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of documents to return (1-100).

query.description: Search query to filter documents by name or content.

modifiedAfter.description: Only return documents modified after this date (ISO 8601 format, e.g., "2024-01-01").
